title: Ways to Split Array Into Good Subarrays
titleCn: 将数组划分成若干好子数组的方式

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,0,0,1] Output: 3 Explanation: There are 3 ways to split nums into good subarrays: - [0,1] [0,0,1] - [0,1,0] [0,1] - [0,1,0,0] [1]
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: There are 3 ways to split nums into good subarrays: - [0,1] [0,0,1] - [0,1,0] [0,1] - [0,1,0,0] [1]

testcases.input: nums = [0,1,0] Output: 1 Explanation: There is 1 way to split nums into good subarrays: - [0,1,0]
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There is 1 way to split nums into good subarrays: - [0,1,0]
